claim: Skills.sh from Vercel allows frictionless extension of Claude Code agents with pre-configured best practices, design guidelines, and tool integrations via simple NPX install commands.
actionable: To extend Claude Code agents with framework-specific best practices, install and reference skills via 'npx skills add <repo>' instead of manually documenting guidelines.
source_title: Skills.sh - LEVEL UP Your Claude Code Agents!

claim: Claude Code agents can automatically reference installed skills (markdown files in .claude/skills/) to follow best practices without explicit prompting if skills are discovered during exploration.
actionable: Organize skill guidelines as markdown files in .claude/skills/ directory and let agents discover them during exploration; they will reference and apply guidelines automatically.
source_title: Skills.sh - LEVEL UP Your Claude Code Agents!

claim: Claude Code with Remotion skills can generate video edits using FFmpeg, Whisper transcription, and code-driven animation without manual editing, combining video processing and LLM reasoning.
actionable: For video editing workflows, provide Claude Code agents with Remotion best practices skill and tools for FFmpeg + Whisper to enable end-to-end video generation from transcripts and assets.
source_title: Skills.sh - LEVEL UP Your Claude Code Agents!

claim: Skills provide structured markdown guidelines organized by topic (rules, calculations, assets, fonts) that agents can fetch and reference without hardcoding into prompts.
actionable: Instead of hardcoding guidelines into system prompts, organize them as skill markdown files that agents can fetch on demand, reducing prompt size and enabling live updates.
source_title: Skills.sh - LEVEL UP Your Claude Code Agents!
